source_materials: User confirmation: Managing Partner & Design Lead at PRTCL
mining_session.focus: Design leadership, product design, collaboration, brand strategy

company_overview.name: PRTCL (Protocol Design Agency)
company_overview.philosophy: Good enough is never good enough

role_details.title: Managing Partner & Design Lead
role_details.approach: Well-researched lens with big picture focus, acute attention to detail, human-centric design, quality materials

achievements.action: Co-led boutique design agency as Managing Partner
achievements.outcome: Delivered design solutions across runway, sport, lifestyle, luxury, and technical markets with nearly 40 years combined expertise
achievements.full_text: Co-led boutique design agency as Managing Partner alongside founder Mark Craig, delivering world-class design solutions across diverse markets including runway, sport, lifestyle, luxury, street, technical, and avant-garde with nearly 40 years combined expertise.

achievements.action: Led design and innovation efforts across eyewear, apparel, sports, and timepieces
achievements.outcome: Established reputation for human-centric design with acute attention to detail and technical excellence
achievements.full_text: Led design and innovation efforts across eyewear, apparel, sports, and timepieces industries for 20+ years, establishing reputation for human-centric design approach combining well-researched insights with acute attention to detail and technical excellence.

achievements.action: Designed products for brands across different markets, price points, and continents
achievements.outcome: Successfully delivered design solutions spanning wide array of materials and market segments
achievements.full_text: Designed products for wide array of brands across different markets, price points, and continents, successfully delivering design solutions in plethora of materials while maintaining quality standards and human-centric approach.

achievements.outcome: Delivered Watch Monster collection, Runwell COMBO and METAL variants from concept to production-ready specifications
achievements.full_text: Co-designed multiple Shinola watch collaboration collections with Mark Craig, delivering Watch Monster collection and Runwell watch in COMBO and METAL variants from concept through production-ready specifications (2021).

achievements.outcome: Extended collaboration beyond timepieces to bicycle design, demonstrating versatility across product categories
achievements.full_text: Co-designed Shinola Bicycle Arrow collaboration collection, extending partnership beyond timepieces to demonstrate design versatility across product categories while maintaining brand alignment and quality standards (2021).

achievements.outcome: Combined big picture thinking with acute attention to detail to deliver comprehensive design solutions
achievements.full_text: Applied research-driven design methodology combining big picture strategic thinking with acute attention to detail, ensuring no element in design process left untouched while maintaining real-world outlook and customer problem-solving focus.

achievements.action: Prioritized quality and enduring materials in product strategies
achievements.outcome: Established reputation for beautiful, lasting designs using premium materials
achievements.full_text: Prioritized quality and human-centric design as paramount to product strategies, selecting enduring and beautiful materials for each individual piece to ensure lasting value and aesthetic excellence.

achievements.action: Applied creative problem-solving to look at challenges differently
achievements.outcome: Delivered innovative solutions by breaking out of established patterns and conventional approaches
achievements.full_text: Applied creative problem-solving philosophy of 'breaking out of established patterns to look at things in a different way,' delivering innovative solutions that challenged conventional approaches while maintaining client objectives and user needs.

achievements.action: Worked tirelessly to find good solutions to customer problems
achievements.outcome: Built strong client relationships through dedicated problem-solving and real-world outlook
achievements.full_text: Worked tirelessly for clients to find good solutions to their customer problems while maintaining real-world outlook, building strong relationships through dedicated service and practical design approach.

achievements.action: Combined technical background with design leadership
achievements.outcome: Ensured comprehensive design process with no element untouched
achievements.full_text: Combined technical background with design leadership expertise to ensure comprehensive design process where no element left untouched, delivering technically sound and aesthetically excellent solutions.

achievements.action: Developed expertise across eyewear, apparel, sports, and timepieces
achievements.outcome: Established versatile design capability spanning multiple product categories and markets
achievements.full_text: Developed deep expertise across four distinct industries (eyewear, apparel, sports, timepieces), establishing versatile design capability that spans multiple product categories while maintaining consistent quality and human-centric approach.

achievements.outcome: Maintained agency philosophy of excellence across all projects and client engagements
achievements.full_text: Upheld world-class design standards aligned with agency philosophy that 'good enough is never good enough,' consistently striving for excellence across all projects while welcoming new challenges and opportunities.

shinola_project_details.collaboration_scope: Multi-product collaboration spanning watches and bicycles

recommended_work_experience_entry.heading: Managing Partner & Design Lead at prtcl inc
recommended_work_experience_entry.note: This entry already exists in justin_harmon_joju_input.json - achievements can enhance existing description
